% This is generated by ESQL's CommandDocsTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

```esql
FROM employees
| WHERE emp_no IN (FROM employees | WHERE salary > 73000 | KEEP emp_no)
     OR (gender == "F" AND (salary > 70000 OR emp_no NOT IN (FROM employees | WHERE languages > 1 | KEEP emp_no)))
| SORT emp_no
| KEEP emp_no, gender, languages, salary
| LIMIT 15
```

| 10009 | F | 1 | 66174 |
| 10019 | null | 1 | 73717 |
| 10023 | F | null | 47896 |

| 10027 | F | null | 73851 |
| 10029 | M | null | 74999 |
| 10041 | F | 1 | 56415 |
| 10044 | F | 1 | 39728 |

| 10092 | F | 1 | 25976 |
